posts.name: Wren Vetens
posts.text:
Dear Experts,
I am having some xrootd and DAVS issues accessing a file on lxplus which I know from local tests should be accessible.
If I try to open the file through xrootd inside of root by using i.e.:
TFile.Open(root:/cmsxrootd.hep.wisc.edu//store/user/wvetens/<file>.root)
I get the following error:
:Error in <TNetXNGFile::Open>: [ERROR] Server responded with an error: [3011] Too many attempts to gain dfs read access to the file
And the same happens if i use cms-xrd-global instead.
Similarly using davs:
TFile.Open(davs://cmsxrootd.hep.wisc.edu:1094/store/user/wvetens/<file>.root) I instead get the following error:
Error in <DavixStat>: can not stat the file with davix: Result HTTP 404 : File not found  after 3 attempts (18)
However, on a gfal-ls, the file is there:
gfal-ls davs://cmsxrootd.hep.wisc.edu:1094/store/user/wvetens/;
Likewise the file cannot be copied through gfal-copy, but local tests at hep.wisc.edu show the file is there and accessible.
Now for the weird part. Without cmsenv, a command like
root -l davs://cmsxrootd.hep.wisc.edu:1094//store/user/wvetens/<file>.root
DOES work. But if I then try to copy the file over locally so that I can then work with it inside cmssw, the following error occurs:
$ gfal-cp-wisc davs://cmsxrootd.hep.wisc.edu:1094//store/user/wvetens/crmc_Sexaq/FlatTree_BDT/BlockAPUReweighed_Signal_1p8_M2S.root BlockAPUReweighed_Signal_1p8_M2S.root Copying davs://cmsxrootd.hep.wisc.edu:1094//store/user/wvetens/crmc_Sexaq/FlatTree_BDT/BlockAPUReweighed_Signal_1p8_M2S.root   [FAILED]  after 3s                                                                                                                                        gfal-copy error: 13 (Permission denied) - TRANSFER ERROR: Copy failed (3rd pull). Last attempt: copy HTTP 401 : Authentication Error
What on earth is going on? Is this perhaps something to do with the recent LXPLUS upgrade?
posts.cooked_html:
Dear Experts,
I am having some xrootd and DAVS issues accessing a file on lxplus which I know from local tests should be accessible.
If I try to open the file through xrootd inside of root by using i.e.:
TFile.Open(root:/cmsxrootd.hep.wisc.edu//store/user/wvetens/<file>.root)
I get the following error:
:Error in <TNetXNGFile::Open>: [ERROR] Server responded with an error: [3011] Too many attempts to gain dfs read access to the file

And the same happens if i use cms-xrd-global instead.
Similarly using davs:

TFile.Open(davs://cmsxrootd.hep.wisc.edu:1094/store/user/wvetens/<file>.root) I instead get the following error:

Error in <DavixStat>: can not stat the file with davix: Result HTTP 404 : File not found after 3 attempts (18)

However, on a gfal-ls, the file is there:

gfal-ls davs://cmsxrootd.hep.wisc.edu:1094/store/user/wvetens/;

Likewise the file cannot be copied through gfal-copy, but local tests at hep.wisc.edu show the file is there and accessible.

Now for the weird part. Without cmsenv, a command like

root -l davs://cmsxrootd.hep.wisc.edu:1094//store/user/wvetens/<file>.root
DOES work. But if I then try to copy the file over locally so that I can then work with it inside cmssw, the following error occurs:
$ gfal-cp-wisc davs://cmsxrootd.hep.wisc.edu:1094//store/user/wvetens/crmc_Sexaq/FlatTree_BDT/BlockAPUReweighed_Signal_1p8_M2S.root BlockAPUReweighed_Signal_1p8_M2S.root Copying davs://cmsxrootd.hep.wisc.edu:1094//store/user/wvetens/crmc_Sexaq/FlatTree_BDT/BlockAPUReweighed_Signal_1p8_M2S.root [FAILED] after 3s gfal-copy error: 13 (Permission denied) - TRANSFER ERROR: Copy failed (3rd pull). Last attempt: copy HTTP 401 : Authentication Error

What on earth is going on? Is this perhaps something to do with the recent LXPLUS upgrade?
